name: playable-ads
description: Create production-ready HTML5 playable ads for mobile game user acquisition, with MRAID integration and network-specific compliance for Unity Ads, ironSource, AdMob, AppLovin, and Meta Audience Network

interface.shortDescription: Build and optimize HTML5 playable ads.
interface.longDescription: Create production-ready HTML5 playable ads with MRAID, asset optimization, and ad-network compliance guidance.
defaultPrompt: Create a match-3 playable ad for AppLovin.
Optimize this playable ad for AdMob's size limit.
Add ironSource MRAID integration to my playable ad.
